metadata.title: Charismo - Your AI Dating Coach | Learn to Flirt, Connect & Date
metadata.description: Charismo is the AI dating coach that turns overthinking into action. Learn confidence, conversation, flirting and dating skills through 20 structured chapters. Free on iOS.
metadata.ogImageAlt: Charismo AI Dating Coach - 5 phases, 20 chapters, 6 AI coaches
metadata.keywords: dating coach, AI dating coach, learn to flirt, dating skills, confidence building, conversation skills, flirting tips, dating app, social skills, dating education

hero.title:
She's right there.
Go talk to her.
hero.subtitle: Charismo is the dating coach that turns overthinking into action.
hero.socialProof: Free on iOS. No credit card.

mindset.title: Your excuses are lying to you

basics.title: Before you learn to flirt
basics.subtitle: Hygiene. Voice. Posture. Style. Discipline. Charismo covers the fundamentals most guys skip.

appShowcase.title: A dating school in your pocket
appShowcase.subtitle: Not a dating app. A dating education app.

coaches.title: A coach that gets your vibe
coaches.description: 6 AI personalities. Pick the one that speaks your language.

pace.title: Built around you
pace.description: Onboarding quiz figures out where you are. Curriculum adapts.

streaks.title: Show up every day
streaks.description: Streaks, progress tracking, graduation. Consistency wins.

habits.title: Knowledge is useless without action
habits.subtitle: Every chapter becomes daily habits you actually do. 38 presets, custom habits, streak tracking, and a coach that roasts you when you slack.

pricing.title: Start today. Free.
pricing.subtitle: Phase 1 is on us. Go premium when you're ready.

hero.subtitle: 25 chapters, 6 AI coaches, 7 practice modes, habit tracking, and a phrasebook. Charismo is a complete dating education system.
hero.note: Free on iOS. No credit card.

guide.title: 25 chapters. 6 phases. One journey.
guide.description: A structured curriculum that takes you from the fundamentals to finding your soulmate. No fluff — just actionable lessons with real exercises.
guide.point1: Phase 0–5: From hygiene basics to relationship commitment
guide.point2: Each chapter has lessons, exercises, quizzes, and book recs
guide.point3: Built-in AI coach conversation after every chapter
guide.point4: Visual learning path — see exactly where you are

coach.title: A coach that actually gets you.
coach.description: 6 AI coach personalities, each with a unique tone, style, and approach. They remember your journey and adapt to your progress.

modes.title: Don't just read. Practice.
modes.description: 7 AI-powered exercise modes that simulate real social situations. Get instant feedback and build real skills.

list.openingLab: Opening Line Lab — AI rates your openers 1–10
list.pingPong: Conversation Ping-Pong — Never run out of things to say
list.rejectionGym: Rejection Gym — Handle rejection with grace
list.dateSim: Date Simulator — Full first-date roleplay with debrief
list.banter: Flirty Banter — Scored for humor and flirtiness
list.replyHelper: Reply Helper — Smart reply suggestions for real messages
list.battle: Flirting Battle — Roleplay against AI characters

habits.title: Turn lessons into daily habits.
habits.description: Knowledge is useless without action. The built-in habit tracker turns every chapter into real daily practice.
habits.point1: 50 preset habits tied to specific chapters

phrasebook.title: Flirting Phrasebook
phrasebook.description: Ready-to-use opening lines, compliments, deepeners, witty responses, and closing lines — with explanations.

books.title: 12 Book Recommendations
books.description: Hand-picked reading list linked to chapters. Personalized order based on your skill level and dating goal.

gamification.title: Gamification
gamification.description: Hearts economy, daily streaks, 7 achievements, quiz scores, and per-habit streaks to keep you going.

personalized.title: Personalized From Day One
personalized.description: Onboarding quiz matches your coach, orders books, adapts tone to your age, and tailors content to your gender.

cta.title: Ready to stop overthinking?
cta.subtitle: Download Charismo and start building the skills that change everything.
cta.note: Free on iOS. No credit card required.

footer.tagline: Teaching the world how to actually connect.
